# River Tech School of Performing Arts & Technology

> River Tech is a private Christian school in Post Falls, Idaho, serving grades 1 through 12. We integrate performing arts, technology, and core academics in small classes (about 15 students) with a competency-based progression. We also operate a flexible à la carte program for homeschool families who want one to four days per week of enrichment.

## Quick facts

- Location: 927 E Polston Ave, Post Falls, ID 83854
- Phone: (425) 444-2081
- Email: learn@rivertech.me
- Grades served: 1 through 12
- Class size: about 15 students, with a 1 to 15 teacher-to-student ratio
- School hours: Full-time students attend Monday through Friday, 8:30 a.m. to 2:35 p.m. Homeschool à la carte students attend 10:25 a.m. to 2:35 p.m. An optional afterschool program running until 4:00 p.m. launches in fall 2026.
- School year: September through May
- Founded: 2023
- Parent organization: Faithful Five Inc., a 501(c)(3) nonprofit
- Accreditation status: unaccredited by choice, issues official diplomas and transcripts
- Next start date: September 1, 2026
- Open enrollment closes: June 5, 2026

## Programs

- [Full-Time School (grades 1-12)](https://www.rivertechschool.com/pages/enrollment.html): Four or five days per week of integrated learning in performing arts, technology, and core academics.
- [Elementary School (grades 1-5)](https://www.rivertechschool.com/pages/elementary-school.html)
- [Middle School (grades 6-8)](https://www.rivertechschool.com/pages/middle-school.html)
- [High School (grades 9-12)](https://www.rivertechschool.com/pages/high-school.html)
- [À La Carte Program](https://www.rivertechschool.com/pages/a-la-carte.html): One to four days per week for homeschool families. Days available: Monday Performing Arts, Tuesday Science and Social Studies, Thursday Life Skills, and Friday Technology.
- [River Tech Days (summer camp)](https://www.rivertechschool.com/pages/river-tech-days.html): May 5-14, 2026 at The Heart Church.

## Daily programs

- [Monday: Performing Arts](https://www.rivertechschool.com/pages/monday-performing-arts.html)
- [Thursday: Life Skills](https://www.rivertechschool.com/pages/thursday-life-skills.html)
- [Friday: Technology](https://www.rivertechschool.com/pages/friday-technology.html)

## What we teach

- Performing arts: drums, bass, guitar, piano, band, acting, musical theater, choir, dance, drawing, filmmaking, and digital arts.
- Technology: AI and machine learning, coding and programming, filmmaking and video editing, 3D modeling and digital design, robotics and circuits, and digital arts.
- Core academics: math, English, science, social studies, foreign language.
- Sports and fitness: athletics and fitness training as part of the weekly schedule.
- Christian worldview: each day begins with prayer, worship, and gratitude. Students are taught to love God, honor their community, take personal responsibility, and build something of their own.

## Tuition and payment (2026-27)

- Household enrollment fee: $250 through June 5, 2026. $300 after June 5 (late enrollment). Fee is annual and covers the entire household.
- Full-time 5-day: $699 per month, $1,950 per quarter, or $7,999 per year.
- Full-time 4-day: $600 per month, $1,679 per quarter, or $6,900 per year.
- À la carte 4-day homeschool: $430 per month, $1,199 per quarter, or $4,999 per year.
- À la carte 3-day homeschool: $339 per month, $960 per quarter, or $4,019 per year.
- À la carte 2-day homeschool: $239 per month, $690 per quarter, or $2,855 per year.
- À la carte 1-day homeschool: $135 per month, $365 per quarter, or $1,500 per year.
- Quarterly billing is our standard plan and the best rate. Families can also choose monthly or annual billing.
- Sibling discount per additional child per quarter: $150 for 5-day, $120 for 4-day full-time, $80 for 4-day homeschool, $60 for 3-day homeschool, $40 for 2-day homeschool, and $20 for 1-day homeschool.
- Idaho families may qualify for the [Parental Choice Tax Credit](https://www.rivertechschool.com/pages/tax-credit.html), which can offset tuition for eligible households.

## How to enroll

Visit [the enrollment page](https://www.rivertechschool.com/pages/enrollment.html) to begin. Open enrollment for 2026-27 closes June 5, 2026. Families new to the area or with a unique situation may contact us mid-year.

## Contact

- Phone: (425) 444-2081
- Email: learn@rivertech.me
- Social: [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/rivertechschool), [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/rivertechschool/), [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@PostFalls)
